description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a classic skate shoe silhouette, featuring a combination of dark blue and black panels on the upper. The shoe has a white and blue speckled rubber sole, providing both grip and visual contrast. The upper material appears to be a mix of suede and canvas, with a signature side stripe in a lighter blue shade. The lacing system uses standard criss-cross laces in a light blue color, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The heel and toe areas show reinforced construction, and the overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A dark blue and black low-top sneaker with a speckled white sole, light blue laces, and a classic skate shoe design. The upper is a mix of suede and canvas with a signature side stripe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, light blue laces, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the signature side stripe, the mix of blue and black panels, and the speckled sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar and the back seam, with the speckled sole visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side stripe, color blocking, and the sole pattern.
